hotel.name: Iva By SKR
hotel.address: 65/1, Hosur Road, Hebbagodi, Electronic City, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560099

support.ticker: Iva By SKR — A Petrichor Hotel • Hebbagodi, Electronic City, Bengaluru • Call: +918035209500 • WhatsApp: 918035209500
support.title: Guest Support
support.subtitle: Helpful policies and support links for a smoother stay.

hero.subtext: Inspired by petrichor, Iva By SKR offers elegant rooms, warm hospitality, and modern comforts just opposite Hebbagodi Metro Station—perfect for business travellers, families, and every memorable stay.

story.paragraph_1: Petrichor is the particular scent of earth after the first rain — familiar, grounding, a little relieving. It's the feeling we've built the hotel around.
story.paragraph_2: That's the brief we hand our housekeeping and front-desk teams too — not luxury for its own sake, but quiet, clean, unfussy comfort that a business or family traveller actually notices.
story.pull_quote: Neat rooms, polite staff, and genuinely good breakfast — the kind of stay that doesn't try too hard, and doesn't need to.

rooms.name: Classic
rooms.description: Compact and efficient — built for the one-night business stopover.

rooms.name: Deluxe
rooms.description: More room to work and unwind, with a seating nook.

rooms.name: Executive Suite
rooms.description: The largest layout, ideal for longer stays.

amenities.title: Housekeeping & Laundry
amenities.description: Daily housekeeping, no need to ask twice.

amenities.title: EV Charging Station
amenities.description: On-site charging point for electric vehicles.

reviews.text: Guests frequently mention how spacious and well-kept the lobby and restaurant are.
Longer-stay guests describe the front desk and housekeeping team as attentive.
Rooms are consistently described as clean and comfortable.
Business travelers frequently highlight how convenient the location is for reaching nearby tech parks and offices, right by the metro.
The breakfast buffet is a repeated highlight, with guests describing it as generous and well-prepared for the price.
Multiple guests describe the front-desk team as courteous and quick to help during check-in.

faq.question: What are the check-in and check-out times?
faq.answer: Standard check-in is from 12:00 PM and check-out is by 11:45 AM.

faq.question: What's the cancellation policy?
faq.answer: Cancellation terms depend on the platform you booked through — check the policy at checkout.

faq.question: Do you host events or group bookings?
faq.answer: For groups or corporate stays, contact the hotel directly.
